note: IBKR is the closest public-disclosing proxy for Robinhood house requirements. Robinhood sets margin dynamically (25-100%) and does not publish a per-ticker feed; actual Robinhood requirements may be within ~10 pts of these. Verify in-app before relying.

STRC.notes: IBKR raised all Strategy Inc. (MSTR) products to 50% min maintenance in Jan 2025 after the crypto-preferred volatility episode. STRC is Strategy's variable-rate perpetual preferred — same umbrella.

EPD.notes: Large-cap MLP, ~$65B cap, tight bid/ask. Standard Reg T territory; IBKR baseline for liquid yield equities runs 25-30%.
